cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who ends up with which ball after all these swaps. There are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Initially, each has a specific color ball. Let me start by jotting down their starting balls. Starting with: - Alice: black - Bob: brown - Claire: blue - Dave: white - Eve: green Now, there are a series of swaps. Let me go through each one step by step. First swap: Dave and Eve swap balls. So Dave, who had white, will now have green, and Eve, who had green, will now have white. Let me update their balls. After first swap: - Alice: black - Bob: brown - Claire: blue - Dave: green - Eve: white Second swap: Bob and Claire swap. Bob had brown, Claire had blue. After swapping: - Alice: black - Bob: blue - Claire: brown - Dave: green - Eve: white Third swap: Claire and Alice swap. Claire has brown, Alice has black. After swapping: - Alice: brown - Bob: blue - Claire: black - Dave: green - Eve:
